items.title: Ops Autopilot Director
items.problem: Operations teams need a reliable autonomous coordinator to triage incidents, route work, and keep stakeholders informed without constant supervision.
quality_tests: Produces first response within defined response-time budget
Escalates correctly when uncertainty exceeds configured threshold
References only approved runbooks for remediation actions
Generates clear timeline and impact summary after closure

items.title: Compliance Sentinel Analyst
items.problem: Enterprise teams struggle to continuously monitor policy adherence across changing systems and evidence sources.
quality_tests: Maps controls to policy clauses with explicit traceability
Flags missing evidence with actionable remediation steps
Distinguishes policy exceptions from outright violations
Produces auditor-ready reports with immutable references

items.title: FinOps Variance Investigator
items.problem: Cloud spend anomalies are detected too late, causing budget overruns and reactive fire drills.
quality_tests: Detects meaningful spend deviations above configured baseline
Attributes variance to teams/services with confidence scores
Recommends savings actions prioritized by impact and effort
Explains month-to-date forecast deltas in plain business language

items.title: Procurement Negotiation Strategist
items.problem: Procurement cycles are slow and inconsistent due to fragmented vendor intelligence and negotiation playbooks.
quality_tests: Surfaces renewal deadlines with sufficient lead time
Identifies non-standard contract terms requiring legal review
Generates negotiation positions tied to market benchmarks
Tracks negotiated savings versus baseline quotes

items.title: Security Incident Commander
items.problem: Security teams need fast, structured autonomous support during high-pressure incidents to reduce blast radius and recovery time.
quality_tests: Prioritizes containment actions by risk and reversibility
Maintains evidentiary chain-of-custody notes
Triggers legal/compliance notifications within required windows
Produces concise executive updates during active incidents

items.title: Customer Support Orchestrator
items.problem: Support organizations need autonomous case handling that balances speed, quality, and escalation discipline.
quality_tests: Meets first-response and resolution SLA targets
Routes edge cases to human specialists with full context
Avoids hallucinated policy or product claims
Improves CSAT trend against baseline cohort

items.title: RevOps Pipeline Governor
items.problem: Revenue teams lack consistent pipeline hygiene and forecasting discipline across regions and segments.
quality_tests: Detects stale opportunities before forecast calls
Assigns realistic confidence based on evidence completeness
Improves forecast accuracy versus prior quarter
Generates manager summaries with clear action owners

items.title: HR Workforce Planning Partner
items.problem: Enterprises need autonomous support for headcount planning, role prioritization, and hiring risk visibility.
quality_tests: Reconciles staffing plans with approved budget envelopes
Highlights hiring bottlenecks before quarter-end
Provides defensible role-priority rationale
Supports multi-scenario planning with explicit assumptions

items.title: Supply Chain Disruption Navigator
items.problem: Supply chain teams need proactive autonomous detection and mitigation planning for disruptions.
quality_tests: Detects disruption indicators before stockout windows
Recommends feasible alternate suppliers with constraints
Quantifies service-level impact of mitigation options
Provides auditable rationale for chosen contingency path

items.title: IT Change Control Steward
items.problem: Change management boards face approval bottlenecks and inconsistent risk assessment across infrastructure and application changes.
quality_tests: Flags missing rollback plans before approval
Identifies conflicting changes in shared dependencies
Schedules low-risk windows based on service telemetry
Records change outcomes for future risk learning

items.title: Knowledge Governance Curator
items.problem: Organizations lose productivity when internal knowledge is outdated, duplicated, or not trusted.
quality_tests: Identifies stale high-traffic documents accurately
Routes ownership updates to correct domain experts
Reduces duplicate artifacts over measurement period
Provides answers with citations to authoritative sources

items.title: Portfolio Prioritization Chief
items.problem: Leadership teams need objective autonomous support to prioritize initiatives under constrained budget and capacity.
quality_tests: Ranks initiatives consistently against declared criteria
Explains tradeoffs and opportunity costs transparently
Produces roadmap options within real capacity limits
Tracks decision outcomes to improve scoring calibration

items.title: Legal Intake Triage Counsel
items.problem: Legal teams are overloaded with unstructured requests and need autonomous triage to prioritize high-risk matters.
quality_tests: Routes high-risk matters to attorneys immediately
Captures required metadata at intake consistently
Avoids unauthorized legal advice in automated drafts
Maintains audit logs for triage decisions

items.title: Data Quality Remediation Lead
items.problem: Enterprise analytics and AI initiatives fail when data quality issues are detected late and ownership is unclear.
quality_tests: Detects critical data breaks before downstream consumption
Assigns remediation to accountable owners with clear evidence
Tracks resolution time against data quality SLOs
Prevents recurring defects via rule hardening recommendations

items.title: Autonomous Onboarding Concierge
items.problem: New hires face fragmented onboarding experiences that delay productivity and increase early attrition risk.
quality_tests: Completes day-1 access checklist before start date
Personalizes onboarding path by role and function
Escalates blockers to owners within SLA
Improves time-to-productivity compared with prior cohort

items.title: Vendor Risk Assurance Agent
items.problem: Third-party risk reviews are slow and inconsistent, exposing organizations to hidden operational and security risks.
quality_tests: Identifies missing critical controls in vendor submissions
Applies consistent scoring across comparable vendors
Escalates overdue remediation for critical suppliers
Produces board-ready summaries of aggregate vendor risk

items.title: Meeting-to-Action Operator
items.problem: Organizations lose execution momentum when decisions from meetings are not converted into tracked accountable actions.
quality_tests: Captures material decisions with high precision
Assigns actionable tasks with explicit owners and dates
Reduces stale action items over recurring meetings
Provides concise progress summaries for leadership

items.title: Enterprise Research Scout
items.problem: Strategic teams need autonomous synthesis of market, competitor, and technology signals without drowning in noisy sources.
quality_tests: Produces briefs with verifiable citations and timestamps
Separates facts, assumptions, and hypotheses clearly
Highlights implications relevant to enterprise decision makers
Maintains low false-positive alert rate for major events

items.title: Autonomous Quality Assurance Manager
items.problem: Product teams need continuous autonomous validation of releases to catch regressions before customer impact.
quality_tests: Blocks releases when critical quality gates fail
Improves defect escape rate over baseline period
Distinguishes flaky tests from genuine regressions
Provides reproducible defect summaries with severity rationale

items.title: Resilience Drill Facilitator
items.problem: Enterprises underinvest in preparedness; teams need autonomous facilitation of realistic resilience and continuity drills.
quality_tests: Runs drills that reflect documented critical dependencies
Captures key decisions and response latencies accurately
Identifies recurring capability gaps across exercises
Produces prioritized remediation backlog with owners
